page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine running on the KVM hypervisor. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with a single thread per core, utilizing Intel Xeon processors clocked at 2.7 GHz. The instance is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a high memory-to-core ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. It does not include local storage or integrated GPU hardware accelerators, relying entirely on network-attached storage for persistent disk operations.

Network connectivity is provisioned with a baseline bandwidth of 3 Gbps. Because the instance lacks local NVMe SSD storage and dedicated graphics processing units, its performance is bound by network-attached storage latency and CPU-based execution. The dedicated CPU allocation ensures that the 4 physical cores are not shared with other tenants, delivering consistent compute performance without virtualization-induced steal time.

With its 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio, the ecs.u2i-c1m8.xlarge offers a resource density profile optimized for memory-bound workloads. This configuration provides qualitative cost efficiency for applications requiring substantial memory footprints without the need for high-vCPU compute scaling. It is suited for workloads such as medium-sized databases, in-memory caching layers, enterprise application servers, and lightweight data processing pipelines.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.u2i-c1m8.xlarge is an x86_64 virtual machine powered by the KVM hypervisor and Intel Xeon processors. It features 4 dedicated vCPUs across 4 physical cores running at 2.7 GHz, with no hyperthreading. The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high 8.0 GB per vCPU memory ratio. It does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 3 Gbps. This memory-optimized configuration is designed for workloads requiring a larger memory footprint relative to compute capacity, such as relational databases, in-memory caching, and backend application servers.

tagline: A memory-optimized virtual machine featuring dedicated Intel Xeon cores and a high memory-to-vCPU ratio for memory-intensive workloads.

32.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per core
